titleStmt.title: SII 25.136: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 136. (A.R. No. 136 of 1908.) TIRUPPATTŪR, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab in the first prākāra of the Tiruttaḷīśvara temple.
This record of Māṟañjaḍaiyaṉ is dated in the 4th year opposite to the 6th year which must be taken as the 6th year opposite to the 4th year.

It commences with a Sanskrit ślōka which records the gift of ten dināra for a lamp to god Śrīsthalīśa by Paṭṭā, the wife of Śaṅkara and the daughter of Māra. The Tamil portion following the Sanskrit verse also records the same in detail. It records the gift of kāśu for maintaining a perpetual lamp to god Tiruttaḷipperumānaḍigaḷ of Tirupputtūr by Paṭṭa, daughter of Māṟa, the wife of (brāhmaṇi) Mōśi Kaṇḍaṉ Śaṅkaraṉ, the son of the kiḻār of Arukandūr. The gift was entrusted under the protection of a body called Āyiratteḻunūṟṟuvar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī śrī .
dīpārttham sthalīśāya
dinārāṇām daśādiśat
paṭṭākhya māratanayā śam
kāsya priyā satī
komāṟañ caṭaiyāṟku yāṇṭu
Āṟu Etir nāṉku Ivvā
ṇṭu Arukantūr kiḻār makaṉ
mocikaṇṭañ caṅkaraṉ pi
rāmaṇi māṟam paṭṭattā
ṉ tirupputtūr tirut
taḷip perumāṉaṭikaḷu
kku nontā viḷakkeriya vai
tta kācu pattu . Ivaikātteri
ppārāyinat teḻunūṟṟu
vāṭi yeṉ talaimela
ṉa The lost line is obliterated.
Digital edition of SII 25.136 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
